strengths: 20 years of progressive engineering experience with clear progression to Staff-level roles and entrepreneurial ventures
Demonstrated engineering leadership: founded GISCollective (open-source platform with real users), organized mentoring workshops (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium training), created educational content
Exceptional technical breadth across full stack (web, mobile, desktop, embedded), cloud deployment (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and infrastructure—shows builder fluency across multiple domains
concerns: No demonstrated shipped AI-powered products or platforms; current AI work at re:cinq appears to be MCP infrastructure tooling rather than strategic AI product development
Missing preferred qualification: holds two Bachelor's degrees only, no Master's or PhD in AI-related field despite role's emphasis on recognized AI expertise
No evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on technology adoption; career focused on individual contribution and startup environments, not large-scale enterprise advisory

key_factors.factor: Engineering leadership and mentorship track record

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally capable engineer with 20 years of experience, strong leadership credentials (Staff roles, founder, mentor), and proven ability to build products across multiple platforms. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' and the ability to advise on 'cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies.' His current AI work at re:cinq is recent and appears infrastructure-focused (MCP code generators), with no evidence of shipped AI products, published research, or strategic customer advisory experience. The absence of an advanced degree in AI further highlights this gap. He is overqualified for most engineering roles but underqualified for this specific AI strategy specialization.
